title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF ALCANTARA NATIONAL TRADE SCHOOL TO ROMBLON NATIONAL INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY

chunks.text:
H. No. 1847; 112 OG NO. 30, 4651 (July 25, 2016)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10849, May 23, 2016 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF ALCANTARA NATIONAL TRADE SCHOOL TO ROMBLON NATIONAL INSTITUTE OF TECHNOLOGY

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Renaming of a National Trade School.

-The name of Alcantara National Trade School in the Municipality of Alcantara, Province of Romblon is hereby changed to Romblon National Institute of Technology.

SEC. 2.

Location of the Main Campus.

â The main campus of the Romblon National Institute of Technology shall continue to remain in its present location in the Municipality of Alcantara, Province of Romblon.

SEC. 3.

Effectivity.

â This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

FRANKLIN M. DRILON

President of the Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on February 3, 2014 and February 2, 2016, respectively.

(Sgd.)

OSCAR G. YABES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.)

MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: MAY 23 2016

(Sgd.)

BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
